citation_and_locator: Sybesma, Rint and Boya Li. 2007. The dissection and structural mapping of Cantonese sentence final particles. Lingua 117(10):1739–1783. DOI 10.1016/j.lingua.2006.10.003; author-uploaded full text and publisher metadata
what_it_supports: Characterization of forty-plus common particles; proposed twelve nondefault sub-syllabic semantic units plus defaults; structural mapping across sentential, discourse, speech-act, and epistemic domains; hierarchy intended to reflect linear order.
limit: The paper explicitly does not explain all impossible combinations and excludes `tim1`, `sin1`, `lei4`, bisyllabic particles, and other forms; the decomposition is theory-bearing and does not validate a complete productive cluster grammar or current runtime ranks.
